calendar.matters:
MOTION / Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Amend Minor'S Compromise Order To Allow For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Dec-05-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Petition to Amend Minor's compromise Order to Allow for Transfer of Structured Settlement Payment Rights to Imer Mendez.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:30:45 a.m. and concluding at 9:38:38 a.m. (D505)

Juan Lozano, Esq. representing Petitioner Imer Mendez who present, placed under oath but did not testify.

Counsel to provide a summary in support for the request.

Good cause appearing, the Court GRANTS petitioner's request subject to written order. Counsel for Petitioner is to prepare and submit a proposed order for review and signature of the Court.

MOTION / Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Amend Minor'S Compromise Order To Allow For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Nov-06-2024 Continued To Nov-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Amend Minor'S Compromise Order To Allow For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Aug-23-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: PETITIONER IMR MENDEZ'S Hearing On Petition To Amend Minor's Compromise Order To Allow For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Off calendar. Matters involving the compromise of a minor's claim are heard in department 505 per SF Local Rule 6.9.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff: Nguyen. (301/RCE)
